mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_practice_set (practice_id, title, student_id, course_id, chapter_id, material_id, question_ids_json, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.practiceId}, #{po.title}, #{po.studentId}, #{po.courseId}, #{po.chapterId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.questionIdsJson}, #{po.status}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), student_id = VALUES(student_id), course_id = VALUES(course_id), chapter_id = VALUES(chapter_id), material_id = VALUES(material_id), question_ids_json = VALUES(question_ids_json), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO learning_practice_attempt (attempt_id, practice_id, student_id, question_id, answer_text, correct, score, expected_answer, feedback, knowledge_names_json, submitted_at) VALUES (#{po.attemptId}, #{po.practiceId}, #{po.studentId}, #{po.questionId}, #{po.answerText}, #{po.correct}, #{po.score}, #{po.expectedAnswer}, #{po.feedback}, #{po.knowledgeNamesJson}, #{po.submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (student_id, question_id, material_id, prompt, expected_answer, last_answer, last_feedback, wrong_count, last_submitted_at) VALUES (#{po.studentId}, #{po.questionId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.prompt}, #{po.expectedAnswer}, #{po.lastAnswer}, #{po.lastFeedback}, #{po.wrongCount}, #{po.lastSubmittedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE material_id = VALUES(material_id), prompt = VALUES(prompt), expected_answer = VALUES(expected_answer), last_answer = VALUES(last_answer), last_feedback = VALUES(last_feedback), wrong_count = VALUES(wrong_count), last_submitted_at = VALUES(last_submitted_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_mastery WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND material_id = #{materialId} AND knowledge_name = #{knowledgeName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_mastery (student_id, course_id, chapter_id, material_id, knowledge_name, total_attempts, correct_attempts, mastery, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.studentId}, #{po.courseId}, #{po.chapterId}, #{po.materialId}, #{po.knowledgeName}, #{po.totalAttempts}, #{po.correctAttempts}, #{po.mastery}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE course_id = VALUES(course_id), chapter_id = VALUES(chapter_id), total_attempts = VALUES(total_attempts), correct_attempts = VALUES(correct_attempts), mastery = VALUES(mastery), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
